nodes.title: 2. Right click and open in mask editor
3. Mask the area for inpaint and save
👑 Pixaroma - Note - START HERE (Episode 64)
widgets_values:
# MODELS AND NODES USED IN THIS WORKFLOW  

---

### I used this Easy Installer for Portable ComfyUI from [HERE](https://github.com/Tavris1/ComfyUI-Easy-Install) after installing that you run the Nunchaku bat file from Addons folder.

---

## 🟣 Nunchaku Qwen-Image DiT Loader

## ⚠️ For Nvidia 40 series and lower, use INT4 models.
## ⚠️ For the 50 series, use FP4 models.

### Download **svdq-int4_r128-qwen-image-edit-2509-lightningv2.0-4steps** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/nunchaku-tech/nunchaku-qwen-image-edit-2509/resolve/main/svdq-int4_r128-qwen-image-edit-2509-lightningv2.0-4steps.safetensors?download=true) 

### Or a different version from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/nunchaku-tech/nunchaku-qwen-image-edit-2509/tree/main) depending on your video card

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

---

## 🟣 Load CLIP

###  Download **qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors) or a bigger model from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/clip`  

---

## 🟣 Load VAE

### Download **qwen_image_vae.safetensors** vae model from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)  

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae`  

---

## 🧩 Nodes Installed from Manager  

- **rgthree-comfy**
- **ComfyUI-nunchaku**
- **ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch**

---

add a purple saphire necklace on her neck and restore the photo
